value.rationale: Antigravity's Hooks feature lets users run custom scripts or shell commands at specific points in the agent's execution loop to enforce rules. This maps to guardrails-safety as a partial capability — it provides policy/safety control over the agent's actions by intercepting at lifecycle events. It is a feature/sub-product of the existing google-antigravity-2-0-managed-agent-runtime-hooks product, specifically the overall Hooks offering under Antigravity's managed agent runtime. The parent is the hooks group already identified in the taxonomy.
